title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Digital

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Digital
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Reliance Digital in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!
